title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Query Space, Budgets, and Stop Policy · Program Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for seeds, origins, paths, query space, budgets, and stop policy and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named browser, network, DNS, parser, filesystem, privacy, accessibility, legal-review, scale, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded crawl-scope policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Record each seed URL, stakeholder, purpose, authorization source, expected content class, and crawl revision.
Define allowed schemes, normalized hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default rules.
Express permitted paths, methods, query keys, values, pagination, fragments, and content types as testable admission rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Seed Identity
steps.instruction:
Order the Seed Identity Authorized crawling and Python authorization-to-recovery evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

content.text: A quiz site-quality team handles case 2029 during a privacy-minimized internal crawl. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seed identity, origin and path admission, resource budgets, and automatic and manual stop policy; all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets; then change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Stop And Contact Policy
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Stop And Contact Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz site-quality team handles case 9410 during a keyboard and screen-reader report review. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seed identity, origin and path admission, resource budgets, and automatic and manual stop policy; automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance; then introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define automatic stop signals, manual kill paths, owner contact, partial-output handling, cleanup, and restart authorization.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Stop And Contact Policy.
steps.why: Retrieving Stop And Contact Policy through the concrete bounded crawl-scope policy case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Stop And Contact Policy, keep Stop And Contact Policy connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.
